Get in Touch

We'd Love to Hear From You

Whether you want to volunteer, partner, attend an event, or simply connect — we're here.

Contact Hayah Ministries

Get in Touch

Reach us by phone, email, or through the contact form. Our team in Ottawa and Nigeria will respond within 2 business days.
